tagline: Quantify every trade with probability math

steps.description: Current price field fills with a realistic asset price, setting the baseline for calculation
Take-profit target price appears, first scenario row populates with a gain target
Stop-loss price fills in, completing the risk/reward scenario inputs
A new price target row appears, showing the tool supports multiple probability scenarios simultaneously
Expected value result appears with color-coded positive/negative EV, probability-weighted P&L breakdown displayed
